since_last: 69% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.02%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.73% · Gold +1.54% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 69% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.02%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.02%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +7.16%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +7.16%, MU +6.59%, MRVL +6.49%, TER +5.64%, INTC +5.46%. Laggards: WDAY -4.61%, INTU -4.55%, ADBE -3.97%, CRM -3.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.52% at $121.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
